zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte Arnould III de Guines於1225年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，他的父親Comte Baudouin III de Guines27歲，母親Mahaut de Fiennes28歲。他與Alix de Coucy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年2月之後在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德布爾布格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte Arnould III de Guines于1225年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯时，他的父亲Comte Baudouin III de Guines27岁，母亲Mahaut de Fiennes28岁。他与Alix de Coucy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年2月之后在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德布爾布格。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guines
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Arnould
meanings: Saxon, Latin: Faithful to his honour; help in war, helping lord; powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte Arnould III de Guines was born in 1225, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Comte Baudouin III de Guines, was 27 and his mother, Mahaut de Fiennes, was 28. He married Alix de Coucy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died after February 1282, in Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte Arnould III de Guines est né en 1225, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Comte Baudouin III de Guines, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Fiennes, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Coucy. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé après février 1282, à Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte Arnould III de Guines 1225 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Baudouin III de Guines 27 und seine Mutter Mahaut de Fiennes 28. Er hat Alix de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb nach Februar 1282 in Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Arnould III de Guines è nato il nel 1225 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Baudouin III de Guines, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de Fiennes, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Coucy. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il febbraio 1282, nel Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte Arnould III de Guinesが1225年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Comte Baudouin III de Guinesは27歳，母Mahaut de Fiennesは28歳であった。Alix de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年2月以後にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードボウルボウルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte Arnould III de Guines(이)가 1225년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Baudouin III de Guines(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de Fiennes(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Alix de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 2월 이후 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 부르보우르그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte Arnould III de Guines nasceu em 1225, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Comte Baudouin III de Guines, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Fiennes, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Coucy. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu após fevereiro de 1282, em Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte Arnould III de Guines родился в 1225 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Baudouin III de Guines было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Fiennes, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Coucy. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер после февраль 1282 г. в местности бурбург, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte Arnould III de Guines nació en 1225, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Comte Baudouin III de Guines, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Fiennes, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alix de Coucy. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de febrero de 1282, en Bourbourg, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
